---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the integration or the card
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the situation. e.g. "I always forget to disable the alarm on
bank holidays and end up waking up to music I don't want."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What would the integration / card do differently? Rough sketch is fine.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Other approaches you've thought about, including HA features you've
tried, or doing nothing.

## Roadmap check

The README lists a v2 backlog of out-of-scope features (one-off
override, skip-next-occurrence, calendar-aware skip, Voice Assist
intents, TTS, etc.). If your idea is already on that list, +1 it in the
comments rather than opening a new request.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mocks, links to similar features in other integrations,
etc.
